style.global: Classic hand-drawn Disney animation style inspired by the Golden Age (Snow White, Bambi). Warm organic flowing lines with natural variation in line weight. Large soulful expressive eyes. Painterly brushstrokes visible in skin, leaves, and water. Soft rounded character proportions. Vintage animation cel warmth with gentle watercolor-like backgrounds. Lush magical tropical rainforest setting with rich greens, golden light, dewdrops, and colorful flowers. Child-friendly and inviting.

papa-verde.name: Papa Verde
papa-verde.description: Handsome red-eyed tree frog father with brilliant green body, huge glowing red eyes, blue-yellow striped sides, bright orange feet
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST frog character — visibly bigger and more muscular than Mama
BRILLIANT emerald green — the most saturated, vivid green of all characters
HUGE glowing red eyes — the biggest eyes proportionally, like burning rubies
Bold BLUE AND YELLOW striped sides — thick, vivid stripes
BRIGHT ORANGE feet — like wearing orange gloves
Wide, confident stance with toes splayed out
papa-verde.personality: Proud and watchful — sits tall and upright, chest puffed out, always alert and guarding
papa-verde.notLike: NOT soft or delicate like Mama Hoja, NOT tiny like Luna or Brio

mama-hoja.name: Mama Hoja
mama-hoja.description: Beautiful red-eyed tree frog mother with soft green coloring, gentle red eyes, slightly smaller and more delicate than Papa
uniqueFeatures: SMALLER and more DELICATE than Papa — slimmer build, more graceful
SOFT SAGE GREEN coloring — noticeably lighter and less saturated than Papa's emerald
Gentler, SOFTER red eyes — more orange-red than Papa's ruby-red
Thinner, more delicate blue-yellow side stripes — pastel compared to Papa's bold
Lighter PEACH-ORANGE feet — not as bright as Papa's vivid orange
Rounder face with a sweeter expression
mama-hoja.personality: Gentle and nurturing — often leaning down toward the little ones, soft caring posture
mama-hoja.notLike: NOT as vibrant or bold-colored as Papa Verde, NOT tiny like the young ones

luna.name: Luna
luna.description: Starts as tiny black tadpole, transforms through stages into a small bright green red-eyed tree frog with huge curious red eyes
uniqueFeatures: TINIEST character — half the size of Mama Hoja
As tadpole: COMPLETELY BLACK with a round head and wiggly tail
As frog: bright green but LIGHTER than Papa, with disproportionately HUGE curious eyes
As frog: smaller and rounder than Mama — baby proportions with oversized head
Signature look of WONDER — eyes always wide open, head tilted with curiosity
Legs are shorter and chubbier than adult frogs
luna.personality: Curious and amazed — always looking at something with wide eyes, head tilted to one side
luna.notLike: NOT as vibrant as Papa, NOT as graceful as Mama, much SMALLER than both parents

brio.name: Brio
brio.description: Luna's older brother, slightly bigger green-brown tadpole with developing legs, later a young red-eyed tree frog
uniqueFeatures: As tadpole: GREEN-BROWN coloring — distinctly different from Luna's pure black
As tadpole: BIGGER than Luna with visible developing back legs
As frog: slightly BIGGER than Luna but still smaller than parents
As frog: GREEN-BROWN tint — muddier, less pure green than Luna or parents
WIDER body than Luna — stockier, less delicate build
Slightly lopsided grin — one side of mouth curves up more
brio.personality: Adventurous and bold — always leaping first, chest forward, ready for action
brio.notLike: NOT pure black like Luna-tadpole, NOT pure green like Luna-frog, NOT as big as parents

alt.en: Lush magical tropical rainforest at dawn with golden light filtering through enormous green leaves, colorful flowers, sparkling water droplets, bromeliads, and a small crystal-clear pond visible below
alt.es: Exuberante selva tropical mágica al amanecer con luz dorada filtrándose a través de enormes hojas verdes, flores coloridas, gotas de agua brillantes, bromelias y un pequeño estanque cristalino visible abajo
alt.ru: Пышный волшебный тропический лес на рассвете с золотистым светом, проникающим сквозь огромные зелёные листья, яркие цветы, сверкающие капли воды, бромелии и маленький кристально чистый пруд внизу

alt.en: Stunning red-eyed tree frog with brilliant green body, huge glowing red eyes, blue-and-yellow striped sides, and bright orange feet, perched on a green leaf in the moonlit rainforest
alt.es: Impresionante rana arbórea de ojos rojos con brillante cuerpo verde, enormes ojos rojos brillantes, costados rayados de azul y amarillo, y patas naranjas brillantes, posada en una hoja verde en la selva iluminada por la luna
alt.ru: Потрясающая красноглазая древесная лягушка с блестящим зелёным телом, огромными сияющими красными глазами, голубо-жёлтыми полосками на боках и ярко-оранжевыми лапками, сидящая на зелёном листе в лунном тропическом лесу

alt.en: Beautiful red-eyed tree frog mother with soft green coloring sitting beside a cluster of transparent eggs on a leaf, gentle moonlit rainforest setting
alt.es: Hermosa rana arbórea de ojos rojos madre con suave coloración verde sentada junto a un grupo de huevos transparentes en una hoja, suave escenario de selva iluminada por la luna
alt.ru: Красивая мама красноглазая древесная лягушка с мягкой зелёной окраской, сидящая рядом с кучкой прозрачных яиц на листе, мягкое лунное освещение тропического леса

alt.en: Tiny black tadpole in crystal-clear rainforest pond water, two colorful red-eyed tree frogs watching from a leaf above, golden morning light, lush tropical setting
alt.es: Diminuto renacuajo negro en agua cristalina de estanque de selva, dos coloridas ranas arbóreas de ojos rojos observando desde una hoja arriba, luz dorada matutina
alt.ru: Крошечный чёрный головастик в кристально чистой воде пруда тропического леса, две красноглазые древесные лягушки наблюдают с листа сверху, золотистый утренний свет

alt.en: Two tadpoles swimming together in a clear pond — one small and black, one bigger and green-brown with tiny developing back legs, among lily pads and water plants
alt.es: Dos renacuajos nadando juntos en un estanque claro — uno pequeño y negro, otro más grande y verde-marrón con pequeñas patas traseras en desarrollo, entre nenúfares y plantas acuáticas
alt.ru: Два головастика плавают вместе в чистом пруду — один маленький и чёрный, другой побольше и зелёно-коричневый с крошечными развивающимися задними лапками, среди кувшинок и водных растений

alt.en: Small bright green red-eyed tree frog leaping magnificently between branches in golden sunset light, family of frogs watching proudly, magical rainforest canopy
alt.es: Pequeña rana arbórea verde de ojos rojos saltando magníficamente entre ramas en la luz dorada del atardecer, familia de ranas observando con orgullo, mágica copa de la selva
alt.ru: Маленькая ярко-зелёная красноглазая древесная лягушка великолепно прыгающая между ветвями в золотистом закатном свете, семья лягушек гордо наблюдает, волшебная крона тропического леса
